scenario: Wren Logistics runs Camunda 8.8 SaaS for 6000 shipments per day. The operator entered batch modification mode to move 25 selected instances but realized the wrong source flow node was picked and wants to leave the mode at any time without applying any of the pending changes to the cluster.
question: How can the operator leave batch modification mode without applying any of the pending changes?

options.text: Refresh the browser tab on the Processes view, which abandons the current batch session and returns the view to its prior selection cleanly across the cluster
Click Exit below the process instance list view at any time, which leaves batch modification mode without applying the pending changes to the selected instances
Click Apply Modification with an empty target, which the engine then treats as a no-op and quietly drops the operator out of batch modification mode in Operate
Wait for the batch modification mode session to time out automatically after a fixed idle period, at which point all pending changes are dropped and the mode exits

a.text: Incorrect. Operate exposes a documented Exit control for leaving batch modification mode; relying on a browser refresh is not the documented way to leave the mode without applying changes.

b.text: Correct. The batch modification guide explicitly states the operator can exit the modification mode at any time by clicking the Exit button below the process instance list view.

c.text: Incorrect. Apply Modification commits the batch operation through the summary modal; it is not a no-op escape hatch. The documented exit path is the Exit button below the list view.

d.text: Incorrect. There is no documented idle timeout that auto-exits batch modification mode; the operator leaves the mode explicitly by clicking the Exit button below the list view.

explanation: Per the batch modification guide, the operator can exit the modification mode at any time by clicking the Exit control below the process instance list view, which leaves batch modification mode without applying any pending changes.
